CustomField.description: If selected, a keyword search using the Title input field will not search the parsed Employer Title 1, Employer Title 2, and Employer Title 3 fields on the Contact record. The Job Title on the Employment History object will be searched.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If selected, a keyword search using the Title input field will not search the parsed Employer Title 1, Employer Title 2, and Employer Title 3 fields on the Contact record. The Job Title on the Employment History object will be searched.
CustomField.label: Disable Parsed Title fields
